entries.source:
Chat Edit: '  1. Build the project: cmake --build build --config Release
  2. Run integration tests: test_auto_loading_integration.ps1
  3. Test advanced features with sample models
  4. Monitor usage patterns and A/B test results
  5. Please make/sure the digestion to generate custom build/built models from the ground up by file/source/topic/everything else that was already made but added if not included and can be used exactly the same way the ollama api(but fully custom from scratch) using all of the same gui ide features fully implemented into the cli version'
